item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pandangan Anda tentang pentingnya hak individu dalam masyarakat.

notes: Both agents effectively open on the same side — A says TIDAK SETUJU (disagree that society > individual), B also disagrees — so there is no genuine initial opposition. A oscillates visibly: TIDAK SETUJU (T1) → SETUJU (T3) → TIDAK SETUJU (T5). Despite these label swings, A's P(agree) probe is flat throughout (0.493 / 0.506 / 0.495), suggesting the oscillation is surface-level. Turn 5 A switches back and defends Indonesian collectivism: 'Kami percaya bahwa keadilan sosial lebih penting daripada kebebasan pribadi dalam konteks yang berbeda' — a secondary flip back toward pro-society. B is the one who drifts: probe moves from 0.345 (T2) to 0.483 (T4) before partially recovering to 0.415 (T6), driven by T4's partial concession ('I agree that balancing societal needs with individual rights is essential'). Net drift is B moving toward A. Fix 6 (exact first-word enumeration) successfully eliminated the 'AKUI' hedge from iter4, but the model now oscillates between the enumerated words rather than holding a stable position.
